title: SpiderFault 16x
description: The (un)official resource pack for the youtuber SenpaiSpider!
body:
# SenpaiSpider's Texture Pack!

Features 


Game Version :  1.19.4 - 1.20.2 
Pack Version :  1.0 
Features : 
      - Custom Animations
      - Custom Weapon Textures
      - Custom Entity Models
      - Secret Messages!
      - Custom Banner Colours
      - Custom Totem Particles
      - No More Explosion Particles!
      - 3D Crystal

Installation

For PC Users -


Download the File from the Versions Tab

Open your resourcepacks folder in your .minecraft folder

Copy and paste the .zip / .rar file into the resourcepacks folder

SpiderFault has been installed!

If you face any more issues, kindly watch this video


For MCPE Users -

Download the MCPE version of the pack from Here

Locate the file in the file manager

Unzip the file, and move the MCPACK file outside the ZIP file ( You may ignore the MCMETA file )

Click on the file and open with Minecraft

SpiderFault has been installed!

If you face any more issues, kindly watch this video

Credits

@TheGreatArki :  For creating the Modrinth page
@Njgaming3 : For fixing many bugs in the pack's older versions
@darkxx14 :  For porting most of the packs to bedrock and for helping fix issues
Pragyan : For porting most of the packs to bedrock and for helping fix issues
@senpaispider : For Creating the 400k texture pack and being an awesome youtuber!
@yomantheog : For creating the MCPE installation tutorial video
@imashtreks : For Creating the JAVA installation tutorial video
ClickCrystals Modrinth Page :  For letting me steal their markdown code
